channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: More than 20 attacks on Iranian healthcare facilities since March 1: WHO
item.description: WHO chief Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus says 'multiple attacks' on Iranian healthcare facilities have been reported.

item.title: At least one killed at UAE’s Habshan gas facility after intercepted attack
item.description: UAE says largest gas facility, Habshan, suffered 'significant damage' after air defence interception sparked fires.

item.title: Drone strike on Sudan hospital kills 10, medical charity MSF says
item.description: Two strikes on Al Jabalain Hospital in White Nile State hit an operating theatre and a maternity ward, MSF says.

item.title: US unemployment rate drops despite economic uncertainty and Iran war
item.description: White House says March jobs report 'blew out expectations' with gains made in the healthcare and construction sectors.

item.title: What we know about the US fighter jet shot down in Iran
item.description: The White House has confirmed Donald Trump has been briefed on the shooting down of a US fighter jet in Iran.

item.title: French-owned container ship transits Hormuz Strait in first since Iran war
item.description: CMA CGM's vessel becomes the first French-owned ship to traverse Hormuz since the US–Israel war on Iran began.

item.title: Drone footage shows a factory in Israel damaged by Iranian missile debris
item.description: Drone footage from Israel shows damage to a factory in Petah Tikva from debris from an intercepted Iranian missile.

item.title: Iranian forces launch search for crew of downed US fighter jet
item.description: News outlets in Iran share photos of wreckage and what appears to be an ejection seat with an attached parachute.

item.title: Trump says with more time, US can ‘take the oil’ in Iran
item.description: Despite weeks long Iranian blockade on Strait of Hormuz, US president claims Washington can 'easily' reopen waterway.

item.title: Red Crescent supply warehouse attacked in southwest Iran
item.description: A video published by the Iranian Red Crescent shows the aftermath of a strike on a storage site in Bushehr.
